---
title: "Benchmarking"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-08"
---

# Loading Libraries and Simulation Data
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(spatstat.geom)
library(spatstat.random)
library(spatstat.explore)
library(SpatialExperiment)
library(spicyR)
library(TreeBH)
library(DART)
source("pfilter.R")
```


```{r}
spe <- readRDS("spe.rds")
spe_pairs <- readRDS("spe_pairs.rds")
```
# Helper Functions

```{r}
canonical_pair <- function(x) {
  ab <- strsplit(x, "__", fixed = TRUE)
  vapply(ab, function(z) paste(sort(z), collapse = "__"), character(1))
}

run_spicy_contrast <- function(spe, cond_A, cond_B, level = c("sub", "major")) {
  level <- match.arg(level)
  cell_col <- if (level == "sub") "cellType_sub" else "cellType_major"

  spe2 <- spe[, spe$condition %in% c(cond_A, cond_B)]
  spe2$condition <- droplevels(spe2$condition)
  spe2$imageID   <- droplevels(spe2$imageID)
  spe2[[cell_col]] <- droplevels(spe2[[cell_col]])

  spicy(
    spe2,
    condition = "condition",
    subject   = "subject",
    cellType  = cell_col,
    imageID   = "imageID"
  )
}
```

# Running spicyR 

## `spe` Object

```{r}
conds <- c(
  "LeafSignal_TtoNK_weak",     "LeafSignal_TtoNK_medium",     "LeafSignal_TtoNK_strong",
  "InternalSignal_TtoNK_weak", "InternalSignal_TtoNK_medium", "InternalSignal_TtoNK_strong",
  "LeafSignal_NKtoCD4_weak",   "LeafSignal_NKtoCD4_medium",   "LeafSignal_NKtoCD4_strong",
  "InternalSignal_NKtoT_weak", "InternalSignal_NKtoT_medium", "InternalSignal_NKtoT_strong"
)

spicy_sub_list <- setNames(
  lapply(conds, function(cc) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe,
      cond_A = "Null",
      cond_B = cc,
      level  = "sub"
    )
  }),
  conds
)

spicy_major_list <- setNames(
  lapply(conds, function(cc) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe,
      cond_A = "Null",
      cond_B = cc,
      level  = "major"
    )
  }),
  conds
)
```

## `spe_pairs`Object

```{r}
pair_table <- tibble(
  scenario = c(
    "Leaf_TtoNK",
    "Internal_TtoNK",
    "Leaf_NKtoCD4",
    "Internal_NKtoT"
  ),
  cond_A = c(
    "Control_Leaf_TtoNK_0p2",
    "Control_Internal_TtoNK_0p2",
    "Control_Leaf_NKtoCD4_0p2",
    "Control_Internal_NKtoT_0p2"
  ),
  cond_B = c(
    "Treatment_Leaf_TtoNK_0p5",
    "Treatment_Internal_TtoNK_0p5",
    "Treatment_Leaf_NKtoCD4_0p5",
    "Treatment_Internal_NKtoT_0p5"
  )
)

spicy_pairs_sub <- setNames(
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_table)), function(i) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe_pairs,
      cond_A = pair_table$cond_A[i],
      cond_B = pair_table$cond_B[i],
      level  = "sub"
    )
  }),
  pair_table$scenario
)

spicy_pairs_major <- setNames(
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(pair_table)), function(i) {
    run_spicy_contrast(
      spe    = spe_pairs,
      cond_A = pair_table$cond_A[i],
      cond_B = pair_table$cond_B[i],
      level  = "major"
    )
  }),
  pair_table$scenario
)
```

```{r}
saveRDS(spicy_sub_list, "spicy_sub_list.rds")
saveRDS(spicy_major_list, "spicy_major_list.rds")
```

## Sanity Checks

```{r}
topPairs(spicy_sub_list[["LeafSignal_TtoNK_weak"]])
topPairs(spicy_major_list[["LeafSignal_TtoNK_weak"]])

topPairs(spicy_pairs_sub[["Leaf_TtoNK"]])
topPairs(spicy_pairs_major[["Leaf_TtoNK"]])
```
